rules.rule: User email must be unique across the entire system
rules.source: AuthService.java:register, UserRepository.existsByEmail, V1__init_schema.sql UNIQUE constraint on email
enforcement: Backend: DuplicateResourceException thrown if email exists
Database: UNIQUE constraint on users.email column

rules.rule: Password must be between 6 and 100 characters
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @Size annotation
Frontend: Validators.minLength(6) in login/register forms

rules.rule: All passwords are stored as BCrypt hashes - never plaintext
enforcement: Backend: BCryptPasswordEncoder applied before User.password is set

rules.rule: After successful registration, the user is automatically logged in (no separate login step required)
enforcement: Backend: register() calls login() with same credentials after user creation

rules.rule: JWT tokens have a 24-hour expiration (86400000ms)
enforcement: Backend: JwtTokenProvider sets expiration date from jwtExpirationMs

rules.rule: JWT tokens are signed with HMAC-SHA512 algorithm
enforcement: Backend: Jwts.builder().signWith(SignatureAlgorithm.HS512, jwtSecret)

rules.rule: JWT token payload contains: userId (subject), email claim, role claim
enforcement: Backend: JwtTokenProvider embeds id, email, role in token claims

rules.rule: Expired, malformed, or invalid JWT tokens are rejected and result in 401 Unauthorized
enforcement: Backend: Token validation in JwtTokenProvider catches all JWT exception types
Frontend: ErrorInterceptor auto-logouts on 401 response

rules.rule: On 401 Unauthorized response, the frontend automatically logs the user out and redirects to login
enforcement: Frontend: ErrorInterceptor catches 401 and triggers logout

rules.rule: Authentication state and JWT token are persisted in localStorage across browser sessions
enforcement: Frontend: AuthService stores token as 'eshop_token' and user as 'eshop_user' in localStorage

rules.rule: Two roles exist: ROLE_USER (default) and ROLE_ADMIN
enforcement: Backend: UserRole enum, default in User entity and DB schema
Database: DEFAULT 'ROLE_USER' in users.role column

rules.rule: Public endpoints (no authentication required): GET /products/**, GET /categories/**, POST /auth/login, POST /auth/register
enforcement: Backend: antMatchers with .permitAll()

rules.rule: Admin-only endpoints: /admin/** (all admin routes require ROLE_ADMIN)
enforcement: Backend: SecurityConfig URL-based + @PreAuthorize('hasRole(ADMIN)') on methods

rules.rule: Authenticated user endpoints: /cart/**, /orders, /users/me, POST /products/{id}/reviews, DELETE /reviews/{id}
enforcement: Backend: .anyRequest().authenticated() catch-all

rules.rule: Frontend cart, checkout, and account routes require authentication (redirects to login)
enforcement: Frontend: AuthGuard on cart, checkout, account routes

rules.rule: Frontend admin routes require ROLE_ADMIN (redirects to home if authenticated but not admin)
enforcement: Frontend: AdminGuard on admin route

rules.rule: A user can only access their own orders (non-admin)
enforcement: Backend: OrderService ownership check throws BadRequestException if not owner and not admin

rules.rule: Product SKU must be unique across all products
rules.source: Product.java @Column(unique=true) on sku, ProductService.java:createProduct existsBySku check
enforcement: Backend: DuplicateResourceException if SKU exists
Database: UNIQUE constraint on products.sku

rules.rule: Product price must be at least £0.01
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @DecimalMin

rules.rule: Sale price, if provided, must be at least £0.01
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @DecimalMin on optional salePrice

rules.rule: Stock quantity cannot be negative (minimum 0)
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @Min(0)

rules.rule: Only active products (active=true) appear in public catalog listings
enforcement: Backend: All public queries filter by active=true

rules.rule: Sale price takes precedence over regular price when displaying or calculating costs
enforcement: Backend: effectivePrice = salePrice != null ? salePrice : price
Frontend: getEffectivePrice() = salePrice ?? price

rules.rule: Featured products appear on the homepage (up to 8 displayed)
rules.source: Product.java featured=false default, ProductService.getFeaturedProducts, HomeComponent loads 8
enforcement: Backend: findByFeaturedTrueAndActiveTrue query
Frontend: HomeComponent requests size=8

rules.rule: Product images are displayed in sortOrder sequence; primary image is the main thumbnail
rules.source: ProductService.java:mapToResponse - sorted by sortOrder, isPrimary flag
enforcement: Backend: Images sorted by sortOrder in mapToResponse
ProductImage.is_primary flag used for thumbnail selection

rules.rule: Product search covers name, description, and brand fields (case-insensitive LIKE)
enforcement: Backend: JPQL LOWER(LIKE) across name, description, brand

rules.rule: Product filtering supports: category, price range (min/max), brand (exact match), keyword (partial match)
enforcement: Backend: JPQL with nullable parameter conditions (IS NULL OR field = param)

rules.rule: Each user has exactly one persistent shopping cart (created lazily on first access)
enforcement: Backend: CartService.getOrCreateCart creates on first access
Database: UNIQUE constraint on carts.user_id

rules.rule: Only active products can be added to the cart
enforcement: Backend: CartService checks product.isActive()

rules.rule: Cannot add more items to cart than available stock quantity
enforcement: Backend: CartService validates stock before add and when updating

rules.rule: Adding an existing product to cart merges quantities (increments existing item quantity)
rules.source: CartService.java:addItem - finds existing item and increments
enforcement: Backend: CartService findFirst matching productId, adds quantities

rules.rule: Combined quantity (existing + new) must not exceed available stock
enforcement: Backend: CartService checks merged quantity against stock

rules.rule: Cart item quantity must be at least 1
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @Min(1) on CartItemRequest.quantity
Frontend: CartComponent.updateQuantity prevents < 1

rules.rule: Cart line total uses effective price (sale price if available, otherwise regular price)
enforcement: Backend: effectivePrice = p.getSalePrice() != null ? p.getSalePrice() : p.getPrice()

rules.rule: Cart response includes available stock quantity for each item (for frontend quantity limit display)
enforcement: Backend: CartItemResponse includes availableStock field

rules.rule: Cart must not be empty to place an order
enforcement: Backend: BadRequestException('Cannot create order from empty cart')

rules.rule: Stock must be sufficient for all items at time of order placement
enforcement: Backend: BadRequestException('Insufficient stock for product: ' + name) for each item

rules.rule: Order item prices use effective price (sale price if available, otherwise regular price)
rules.source: OrderService.java:createOrder - effectivePrice = salePrice != null ? salePrice : price
enforcement: Backend: Effective price calculated per item at order time

rules.rule: Product name and SKU are captured as snapshots at order time for historical accuracy
rules.source: OrderItem.java: productName, productSku columns; OrderService creates with .productName(product.getName())
enforcement: Backend: OrderItem stores productName/productSku snapshot
Database: product_id SET NULL on delete but name/sku persist

rules.rule: Free shipping is applied to orders with subtotal >= £100; standard shipping is £9.99
enforcement: Backend: shipping = subtotal >= 100 ? ZERO : 9.99
Frontend: CartComponent.getShipping(), CheckoutComponent.getShipping() mirror this logic

rules.rule: Tax (VAT) is 20% of the order subtotal (not including shipping)
enforcement: Backend: tax = subtotal.multiply(TAX_RATE)
Frontend: getTax() = subtotal * 0.20 mirrored in CartComponent and CheckoutComponent

rules.rule: Order total = subtotal + shipping + tax
enforcement: Backend: total calculation in createOrder
Frontend: getTotal() = subtotal + getShipping() + getTax()

rules.rule: Product stock is decremented immediately when order is placed (no reservation system)
enforcement: Backend: Stock decremented per item in createOrder loop

rules.rule: Cart is cleared automatically after successful order placement
enforcement: Backend: Cart items cleared in same transaction as order save
Frontend: cartService.clearLocalCart() called on order success

rules.rule: Payment is automatically marked as PAID upon order placement (simulated payment)
enforcement: Backend: PaymentStatus.PAID set unconditionally - no real payment gateway

rules.rule: Order number format: ORD-{yyyyMMddHHmmss}-{4-digit random}
enforcement: Backend: LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern('yyyyMMddHHmmss')) + random 1000-9999

rules.rule: New orders are created with PENDING status
enforcement: Backend: Order entity default status PENDING

rules.rule: Order status lifecycle: PENDING -> CONFIRMED -> PROCESSING -> SHIPPED -> DELIVERED (can also be CANCELLED or REFUNDED)
enforcement: Backend: OrderStatus enum with 7 states
Frontend: AdminOrdersComponent limits status options to 6 (excludes REFUNDED)

rules.rule: Available payment methods: CREDIT_CARD, PAYPAL, BANK_TRANSFER
enforcement: Frontend: CheckoutComponent paymentMethods definition
Backend: paymentMethod stored as free-text string - no server-side validation

rules.rule: Each user can submit only one review per product (one review per user-product pair)
enforcement: Backend: DuplicateResourceException('You have already reviewed this product')
Database: UNIQUE(user_id, product_id) constraint on reviews table

rules.rule: Review rating must be between 1 and 5 (inclusive)
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @Min(1) @Max(5)
Database: CHECK constraint rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5
Frontend: Validators.min(1) Validators.max(5) in review form

rules.rule: Review title maximum 100 characters, comment maximum 2000 characters
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @Size annotations
Frontend: Validators.maxLength(2000) on comment

rules.rule: Only approved reviews are publicly visible and counted in average rating
enforcement: Backend: All review queries filter by approved=true
Default: Review.approved = true (auto-approved)

rules.rule: Product average rating is recalculated after every review create or delete
rules.source: ReviewService.java:updateProductRating called after save and delete
enforcement: Backend: updateProductRating() recalculates from all approved reviews and saves product

rules.rule: Average rating is stored as a denormalized field on the Product (2 decimal places, HALF_UP rounding)
rules.source: Product.java: averageRating field, ReviewService.java:updateProductRating: setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP)
enforcement: Backend: Product.averageRating updated on every review change

rules.rule: A review can only be deleted by the review author or an admin
enforcement: Backend: BadRequestException('You can only delete your own reviews') if not owner and not admin

rules.rule: Category name and slug must be globally unique
rules.source: Category.java: @Column(unique=true) on both name and slug, CategoryService slug uniqueness checks
enforcement: Backend: DuplicateResourceException on duplicate slug
Database: UNIQUE constraints on categories.name and categories.slug

rules.rule: Category hierarchy supports two levels: root categories and their children (parent-child)
enforcement: Backend: Category.parent nullable FK self-reference
Database: categories.parent_id FK to categories.id

rules.rule: Deleting a parent category does not cascade-delete its children; children become root categories
rules.source: V1__init_schema.sql: parent_id REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
enforcement: Database: ON DELETE SET NULL on parent_id FK

rules.rule: Only active categories and active children are shown in the public category tree
rules.source: CategoryService.getAllRootCategories: filter(Category::isActive), mapToResponse: filter children by isActive
enforcement: Backend: CategoryService filters active categories for public listing

rules.rule: Category tree (root categories) is cached to improve performance
enforcement: Backend: Spring Cache @Cacheable, evicted on create/update/delete with @CacheEvict

rules.rule: Category slug is used for URL-friendly identification in API routes
enforcement: Backend: CategoryRepository.findBySlug method available

rules.rule: All API input validation uses JSR-303 Bean Validation (@Valid on request bodies)
rules.source: All controller methods use @Valid @RequestBody, DTOs use javax.validation annotations
enforcement: Backend: Spring Boot auto-validates @Valid parameters and throws MethodArgumentNotValidException

rules.rule: Validation errors return HTTP 400 with field-level error map
enforcement: Backend: GlobalExceptionHandler maps MethodArgumentNotValidException to {fieldName: errorMessage} map

rules.rule: Cart item quantity must be at least 1
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation @Min(1)

rules.rule: Order requires non-blank payment method and a complete shipping address
enforcement: Backend: Bean Validation on OrderRequest and nested AddressRequest

rules.rule: Order items preserve product name and SKU as immutable snapshots at purchase time
rules.source: OrderItem.java: productName, productSku fields; OrderService populates from product at order creation
enforcement: Backend: OrderItem.productName/productSku set from product at create time
Database: product_id FK SET NULL on product delete but name/sku fields remain

rules.rule: Cart item quantity must always be > 0 (enforced at database level)
enforcement: Database: CHECK constraint on cart_items.quantity

rules.rule: Order item quantity must always be > 0 (enforced at database level)
enforcement: Database: CHECK constraint on order_items.quantity

rules.rule: Review rating must be 1-5 at database level (double enforcement with application layer)
enforcement: Database: CHECK constraint on reviews.rating

user_registration.name: User Registration Workflow
steps: User submits registration form with firstName, lastName, email, password, optional phone
Frontend validates: required fields, email format, password min 6 chars
POST /api/auth/register with RegisterRequest
Backend validates: @NotBlank email, @Email, @Size(min=6,max=100) password, name fields
Check email uniqueness: if exists throw DuplicateResourceException (HTTP 409)
Hash password with BCrypt
Create User entity with ROLE_USER, enabled=true
Save to users table
Auto-login: authenticate with same credentials
Generate JWT token with userId, email, role claims
Return AuthResponse with JWT token + user info
Frontend stores token in localStorage as 'eshop_token'
Frontend stores user as 'eshop_user' in localStorage
Frontend emits new auth state via BehaviorSubject
Navigate to home page

user_login.name: User Login Workflow
steps: User submits login form with email and password
Frontend validates: email format, password min 6 chars
POST /api/auth/login with LoginRequest
Backend validates request with @Valid
Spring AuthenticationManager authenticates email + password
UserDetailsServiceImpl.loadUserByUsername finds user by email
BCrypt password comparison
On success: generate JWT token with userId, email, role
Return AuthResponse with token and user details
Frontend stores auth data in localStorage
Frontend cart loaded automatically (header component subscribes to auth state)
Navigate to home page

add_to_cart.name: Add to Cart Workflow
steps: User clicks Add to Cart on product card or product detail page
If not authenticated: redirect to /auth/login
If authenticated: POST /api/cart/items with {productId, quantity}
Backend: validate CartItemRequest (@NotNull productId, @Min(1) quantity)
Load or create user's cart (getOrCreateCart)
Fetch product by ID
Check product.isActive() - if inactive throw BadRequestException
Check product.stockQuantity >= quantity - if insufficient throw BadRequestException
Check if product already in cart
If exists: newQty = existing.quantity + request.quantity; check newQty <= stockQuantity
If new: create CartItem with product and quantity
Save cart
Calculate cart response: line totals use effectivePrice (salePrice ?? price)
Return CartResponse with updated items, subtotal, totalItems
Frontend updates reactive cart state (BehaviorSubject)
Header cart badge updates automatically

checkout_and_place_order.name: Checkout & Order Placement Workflow
steps: Authenticated user navigates to /checkout (protected by AuthGuard)
CheckoutComponent loads user profile and pre-populates shipping address
User fills shipping form: street (req), city (req), state (opt), zipCode (req), country (req)
User selects payment method (CREDIT_CARD / PAYPAL / BANK_TRANSFER)
User clicks Place Order
Frontend validates both forms - invalid forms abort submission
POST /api/orders with {paymentMethod, shippingAddress, notes}
Backend loads user and verifies cart exists and is non-empty
Iterate cart items: for each item check stock >= quantity (BadRequestException if not)
Calculate effectivePrice per item (salePrice ?? price)
Build OrderItem with product snapshot (name, sku, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice)
Calculate subtotal = sum of all line totals
Calculate shipping = subtotal >= £100 ? £0 : £9.99
Calculate tax = subtotal * 0.20
Calculate total = subtotal + shipping + tax
Generate order number: ORD-{yyyyMMddHHmmss}-{random}
Set order status = PENDING, payment status = PAID
Save order and order items (cascade)
Decrement stock for each product and save
Clear all items from cart and save
Return OrderResponse with complete order details
Frontend clears local cart state
Frontend displays order confirmation with order number

product_review.name: Product Review Submission Workflow
steps: Authenticated user on product detail page submits review form
Form requires: rating (1-5 required), optional title (max 100 chars), optional comment (max 2000 chars)
POST /api/products/{productId}/reviews
Backend validates ReviewRequest (@Min(1) @Max(5) rating, @Size constraints)
Check duplicate: if user already reviewed this product throw DuplicateResourceException
Load product and user entities
Create Review with approved=true (auto-approved)
Save review
Recalculate product average rating from all approved reviews
Update product.averageRating (2dp, HALF_UP) and product.reviewCount
Save updated product
Return ReviewResponse
Frontend prepends new review to review list
Show success snackbar

admin_order_status_update.name: Admin Order Status Update Workflow
steps: Admin navigates to /admin/orders (protected by AdminGuard)
Admin order table loads all orders paginated
Admin selects new status from dropdown for an order
PUT /api/admin/orders/{id}/status?status={newStatus}
Backend: @PreAuthorize('hasRole(ADMIN)') enforced
Load order by ID (404 if not found)
Update order.status to new status
Save order
Return updated OrderResponse
Frontend updates the order in the table in-place

product_search_filter.name: Product Search & Filter Workflow
steps: User navigates to /products or uses header search
URL query params (keyword, categoryId) pre-populate filter form
User can set: keyword, category, minPrice, maxPrice, brand, sortBy, sortDir
Filter changes trigger debounced (400ms) product reload
GET /api/products/search with filter params
Backend executes findWithFilters JPQL query with nullable params
Returns paginated ProductResponse list
Pagination controls allow navigation through results
Clear filters resets to default (createdAt desc)

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: Sum of all line totals (effectivePrice * quantity)

fields.name: salePrice
fields.description: Optional sale price - takes precedence over regular price

critical_rules: ORD-004: Order snapshot for historical accuracy
key_workflows: Add to Cart (lazy cart + stock validation)
